← All IRC handicap examples

IRC — competitor with no TCC is excluded from scoring; others scored normally

A boat entered in a handicap fleet with no rating is rejected from scoring entirely. It does not appear in results and does not affect fleet size or other competitors' points.

Scoring system: IRC    Gun time: 14:00:00 
Rated fleet size = 2 (Boat 2 excluded), so penalty = 3.
Start 14:00:00 (= 50400 s since midnight)

Boat 1 (TCC 1.05): finish 15:05:00  ET = 3900 s   CT = 3900 × 1.05 = 4095.0 s  → 2nd  (2 pts)
Boat 2 (no TCC):   finish 15:10:00  — excluded (no rating)
Boat 3 (TCC 0.95): finish 15:03:00  ET = 3780 s   CT = 3780 × 0.95 = 3591.0 s  → 1st  (1 pt)

Boat 2 has a recorded finish time but no TCC, so it is excluded from scoring.
    no ircTcc — unrated
  sailor "2" is excluded — no expected entry
RankNameSail #TCCTCFFinish timeETCTPoints
1 Gamma 3 0.950 0.9500 15:03:00 63m 00s 59m 51s 1
2 Alpha 1 1.050 1.0500 15:05:00 65m 00s 68m 15s 2
sailscoring.ie
